title: ornithogalum narbonense subsp. brevistylum
intro: Ornithogalum narbonense subsp. brevistylum, also known as the narrow-styled star of Bethlehem, is a plant species belonging to the Asparagaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits associated with this plant include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality. Ornithogalum narbonense subsp. brevistylum can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its potential health benefits.
